stages.title: Discover public control surface
stages.proof: PUBLIC_ONLY=true

stages.title: Inspect marketplace offer
stages.proof: offer/listing/receipt rails visible

stages.title: Select capability bundle
stages.proof: CAPABILITY_BUNDLES=LIVE

stages.title: Check capability access
stages.proof: ACCESS_ALLOWED or ACCESS_DENIED

stages.title: Select commercial plan
stages.proof: pricing JSON and buy rail live

stages.title: Open Stripe Checkout
stages.proof: fake_checkout=false

stages.title: Verify Stripe session
stages.proof: SESSION_RETRIEVED

stages.title: Bind entitlement to KV
stages.proof: ENTITLEMENT_ACTIVE after paid session

stages.title: Expose receipt proof
stages.proof: RECEIPT_FOUND after paid session

stages.title: Record metered usage
stages.proof: USAGE_RECORDED after ACCESS_ALLOWED

stages.title: Write usage ledger proof
stages.proof: USAGE_LEDGER_RECORDED with SHA-256 entry hash

stages.title: Enforce usage quota
stages.proof: USAGE_QUOTA_EXCEEDED blocks write before usage and ledger

stages.title: Verify usage ledger
stages.proof: USAGE_LEDGER_VERIFIED by SHA-256 cold replay

stages.title: Use entitlement-bound usage
stages.proof: ENTITLEMENT_USAGE_PENDING blocks unpaid sessions; paid sessions write quota-gated ledger usage

stages.title: Read buyer control capsule
stages.proof: BUYER_CONTROL_PENDING or BUYER_CONTROL_READY exposes session authority, quota, ledger, and verification state

stages.title: Read marketplace control closure
stages.proof: CONTROL_CLOSURE_READY exposes the consolidated marketplace OS state

stages.title: Read public control digest
stages.proof: PUBLIC_CONTROL_DIGEST_READY emits one canonical SHA-256 seal for the marketplace OS

stages.title: Read public control receipt
stages.proof: PUBLIC_CONTROL_RECEIPT_ISSUED binds the marketplace OS digest to the public receipt hash

stages.title: Verify public control receipt
stages.proof: PUBLIC_CONTROL_RECEIPT_VERIFIED recomputes the receipt hash and confirms digest match

stages.title: Read public control chain index
stages.proof: PUBLIC_CONTROL_CHAIN_INDEX_READY binds digest, receipt, verifier, closure, Product OS, and route map

stages.title: Verify public control chain
stages.proof: PUBLIC_CONTROL_CHAIN_VERIFIED recomputes the chain hash and confirms the public chain index

stages.title: Read public control chain certificate
stages.proof: PUBLIC_CONTROL_CHAIN_CERTIFICATE_ISSUED binds the verified chain into a certificate hash

stages.title: Verify public control chain certificate
stages.proof: PUBLIC_CONTROL_CHAIN_CERTIFICATE_VERIFIED recomputes the certificate hash and confirms the verified chain certificate

stages.title: Read public control chain seal
stages.proof: PUBLIC_CONTROL_CHAIN_SEALED binds the verified certificate into a final public chain seal

stages.title: Verify public control chain seal
stages.proof: PUBLIC_CONTROL_CHAIN_SEAL_VERIFIED recomputes the seal hash and confirms the final public chain seal

stages.title: Read public control chain archive
stages.proof: PUBLIC_CONTROL_CHAIN_ARCHIVED binds final seal verification into an evidence archive

stages.title: Verify public control chain archive
stages.proof: PUBLIC_CONTROL_CHAIN_ARCHIVE_VERIFIED recomputes archive hash and confirms final evidence archive
